projects.title: SEO Growth System

projects.title: Duaa Al Khaleej Co. Ltd
projects.description: Corporate construction website designed to showcase services, build trust, and drive project inquiries.
projects.longDescription: A premium corporate website for Duaa Al Khaleej Co. Ltd, a Gulf-based leader in construction, logistics, and industrial solutions. The site showcases their extensive service portfolio, builds trust with high-quality visuals and case studies, and drives qualified project inquiries.

projects.title: Vapi AI Voice Agent
projects.description: AI automation workflow connecting webhooks, model responses, and messaging tools for faster customer communication
projects.featuredDescription: Automated AI agent workflow built to receive leads, process messages, and trigger smart follow-up actions.
projects.longDescription: An AI automation workflow built around Vapi-style voice and messaging automation, connecting lead intake, webhooks, model responses, and follow-up tools to help businesses respond faster and keep customer communication moving.

projects.title: AI Task Management Agent
projects.description: Automation system that reads chat messages, identifies tasks, stores context, and updates Google Sheets in real time.
projects.longDescription: An AI task management automation system that reads incoming chat messages, identifies actionable tasks, stores useful context, and updates Google Sheets in real time so teams can keep work organized without manual tracking.

projects.title: Company Policy RAG Model

projects.longDescription: An AI knowledge workflow that loads company policy documents, creates embeddings, and stores structured knowledge inside Pinecone so teams can retrieve smarter, more accurate answers from internal policy data.
